title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO FATHER PEDRO S. DE ACHUTEGUI.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3273 / 69 OG No. 10, 1898 (March 5, 1973)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6628, October 23, 1972 ]

AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO FATHER PEDRO S. DE ACHUTEGUI.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Father Pedro S. de Achutegui is hereby granted Philippine Citizenship with all the rights, privileges and prerogatives appurtenant thereto.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

GIL J. PUYAT

CORNELIO T. VILLAREAL

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

Finally passed by the Senate on September 23, 1972.

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was finally passed by the same on May 20, 1971.

ELISEO M. TENZA

INOCENCIO B. PAREJA

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House Representatives

Approved: October 23, 1972

FERDINAND E. MARCOS

President of the Philippines
